name: @ts-fix/engine-plan-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's PURE two-tier engine planner (RULE-018 — the partial-honesty contract, P0). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @ts-fix/capabilities-effect for shouldActivate/resolveSeverity (RULE-019/020) and the RuleMeta/Severity/Capability/Tier contract. Plain synchronous pure planner; Effect ecosystem in the contract/types only.
